title: DeepSeek-V4: The Economics of the Million-Token Brain
description: How a redesigned attention mechanism turns long-context AI from a luxury into a utility — and what it means for the tools developers use every day.

title: From Prompt Tweaks to Learning Machines: The Agent Skill Primitive
description: How AI agents are evolving from static prompt followers to dynamic learning machines — and what the agent skill primitive means for the future of autonomous systems.

title: Beyond the Hype: A Deep Dive into the Systemic, Algorithmic, and Cognitive Roots of the Infinite Software Crisis
description: A systems-level analysis of the Infinite Software Crisis, connecting weak guardrails, model training limits, and human cognitive bias to long-term software fragility.

title: Designing Agentic Systems: Lessons from LLM Coding Tools
description: LLM coding tools are the most demanding test of agentic system design. Here's what building and using them teaches about agents that actually work.

title: Context Engineering: The Real Secret to Magical AI Agents
description: The difference between a basic AI demo and a magical product isn't the model — it's the context. A practical breakdown of context engineering.

title: Best Practices for Agentic Reasoning in Production: Lessons from Anthropic and My Own Experience
description: What actually works when deploying agentic reasoning systems in production — lessons distilled from Anthropic's guidance and real-world experience.

title: Reverse-Engineering OpenAI’s Deep Research: How to Balance Power with Safety
description: A practical reverse-engineering of OpenAI's Deep Research system architecture, with lessons for balancing autonomous capability, reliability, and safety in production.

title: Chain-of-Thought vs. ReAct: A Deep Dive into Reasoning Paradigms for Large Language Models
description: A rigorous comparison of two dominant reasoning paradigms — when to use each, and what their tradeoffs reveal about how LLMs actually think.

title: The Shock of DeepSeek-R1 and the Legacy of Eclipse
description: DeepSeek-R1 arrived like a shock to the system. What it means for the frontier, and what history tells us about moments like this.
